languages.original_text: "I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."

languages.text: "Всего раз в жизни мне приходилось сталкиваться с техножрецами подобного сана. Слуга Омниссии, носящий такой же титул, участвовал в создании Глейто".
"I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."
languages.original_text: "Всего раз в жизни мне приходилось сталкиваться с техножрецами подобного сана. Слуга Омниссии, носящий такой же титул, участвовал в создании Глейто".

traits.locale_text: "I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."
"I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."
"I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."

languages.text: 「私は、同じような地位のテクプリストと出会ったことが一度だけあります。同じ称号を持つオムニシアのしもべが、グレイトの創造に関わっていました」
languages.original_text: "I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."

traits.locale_text: 「私は、同じような地位のテクプリストと出会ったことが一度だけあります。同じ称号を持つオムニシアのしもべが、グレイトの創造に関わっていました。」

languages.text: « Je n'ai connu qu'un seul technoprêtre d'aussi haut rang, un serviteur de l'Omnimessie avec le même titre qui a participé à la création de Glaito. »
languages.original_text: "I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."

traits.locale_text: « Je n'ai connu qu'un seul technoprêtre d'aussi haut rang, un serviteur de l'Omnimessie avec le même titre qui a participé à la création de Glaito. »

languages.text: "Ich bin erst einmal einem Techpriester dieses Ranges begegnet. Ein Diener des Omnissiah mit demselben Titel war an der Herstellung von Glaito beteiligt."
languages.original_text: "I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bin erst einmal einem Techpriester dieses Ranges begegnet. Ein Diener des Omnissiah mit demselben Titel war an der Herstellung von Glaito beteiligt."

languages.text: "Daha önce bu rütbeye mazhar olmuş tek bir Tekno Rahip ile temas kurmuştum. Hermesih'in aynı ünvana sahip bir hizmetkârı, Glaito'nun yaratılışında yer almıştı."
languages.original_text: "I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."

traits.locale_text: "Daha önce bu rütbeye mazhar olmuş tek bir Tekno Rahip ile temas kurmuştum. Hermesih'in aynı ünvana sahip bir hizmetkârı, Glaito'nun yaratılışında yer almıştı."

languages.text: «Solo he conocido a otro tecnosacerdote con ese rango. Un siervo del Omnissiah que ostentaba el mismo título estuvo involucrado en la creación de Glaito».
languages.original_text: "I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."

traits.locale_text: «Solo he conocido a otro tecnosacerdote con ese rango. Un siervo del Omnissiah que ostentaba el mismo título estuvo involucrado en la creación de Glaito».

languages.text: “我平生只接触过另一位同等级别的技术神甫。那位拥有相同头衔的欧姆尼赛亚之仆曾参与过格雷托的创造。”
languages.original_text: "I have only ever come into contact with one other Tech-Priest of such rank. A servant of the Omnissiah with the same title was involved in the creation of Glaito."

traits.locale_text: “我平生只接触过另一位同等级别的技术神甫。那位拥有相同头衔的欧姆尼赛亚之仆曾参与过格雷托的创造。”
